name: Octopus Ninja
physical: Purple ninja gear with octopus tentacles. Black mask with tribal octopus symbol. Jet-propulsion eight-tentacled skirt.
personality: Lethal, athletic, inquisitive. Can be 'staggered by musing'. Suspicious of myths.
never_does: Fail to find flight; stay to be caught.

does_not_know: True nature of Virina Brila initially
